project_name: Run / Execution 进度账本与幂等续作
description: 允许 Run at-least-once 重复调用，通过 Requirement 单写、Execution/Step 账本、checkpoint、effect 和 observation 实现进度发现、安全续作与前端可观测。

blockers: Required eadp-backend skill is not available
Required suid skill is not available
Eight existing uncommitted backend files must be classified and preserved
A dedicated Requirement branch/worktree has not been recorded

tech_stack.delivery: single requirement feature branch + GitLab MR, no automatic merge

architecture_decisions.decision: At-least-once Run with shared Execution progress ledger
architecture_decisions.rationale: Repeated invocation cannot be eliminated reliably; durable progress prevents repeated work.

architecture_decisions.decision: One worktree and one writer per Requirement
architecture_decisions.rationale: Keeps file and Git history linear across multi-step work.

architecture_decisions.decision: Authoritative aggregate snapshot plus version notification and polling fallback
architecture_decisions.rationale: Separates correctness from transport timeliness and gives the frontend an observable canonical state.
alternatives_considered: derive state from Run log WebSocket

tasks.title: 数据库、实体和 DAO 基线
acceptance_criteria: PostgreSQL migration and JPA mappings validate
All approved uniqueness and sequence constraints exist
Historical Run rows remain readable
Concurrent insert conflict returns the unique business record

tasks.title: ProgressService 核心原子协议
acceptance_criteria: Execution find-or-create and step claim are atomic
Old claim or fencing token is rejected
Critical checkpoint failure rolls back state
VERIFIED cannot be downgraded by ordinary commands
Requirement snapshotVersion is monotonic

tasks.title: 聚合查询、人工 Observation 与进度事件
acceptance_criteria: Overview returns backend-derived canonical status
Detail APIs are paginated and authorized
Progress events are emitted after commit
Sensitive evidence is redacted before DTO mapping

tasks.title: Runner preflight、Run 绑定和自动 checkpoint
acceptance_criteria: Same invocation key returns the same Run
Repeated Run reads shared progress and skips VERIFIED steps
Progress snapshot and nextActions are injected before Agent start
Thread, turn, heartbeat, Git and terminal evidence are persisted
Run terminal state does not directly settle Execution

tasks.title: Requirement worktree lease、Git checkpoint 与接管
acceptance_criteria: One physical worktree and branch per Requirement
Lease, local file lock and fencing token are all required for writes
APPLIED creates a checkpoint commit and CAS advances currentHead
Unknown uncommitted changes are reconciled, never overwritten
Different Requirements remain parallel

tasks.title: Effect ledger 与 MR 交付改造
acceptance_criteria: Same effect key and hash replays the first result
UNKNOWN effect is queried before retry
Repeated delivery updates one MR
MR source SHA equals verified workspace HEAD
No GitLab merge API is called

tasks.title: ProgressReconciler 与补偿器切换
acceptance_criteria: Timed-out Run becomes UNKNOWN before reconciliation
Completed effects and VERIFIED steps are not repeated
Partial execution resumes from nextAction
Late old-Run terminal events cannot overwrite new owner state
Repeated compensation cycles are idempotent

tasks.title: RequirementWorkspace 前端可观测视图
acceptance_criteria: Execution progress tab shows steps, owner, lease, checkpoint and next action
Run observations, raw logs and evidence are separately viewable
Automation completion and MR merge status are distinct
Snapshot version prevents UI rollback
WebSocket disconnect falls back to polling and shows stale state

tasks.title: 兼容迁移、开关和旧逻辑退场
acceptance_criteria: Shadow-read, new-write and authoritative-ledger stages are switchable
Legacy Run remains visible without fabricated verification
New and old status differences are observable
Rollback preserves all audit records
Old hasActiveRun logic no longer blocks valid repeated Runs after cutover

tasks.title: 原子性与并发独立验收
acceptance_criteria: Fifty concurrent Runs produce exactly one step owner
Expired lease takeover rejects late old-token writes
Sequence and unique-key races are deterministic
Transaction fault injection produces no partial state

tasks.title: 三类失败、Effect 与 MR 恢复独立验收
acceptance_criteria: Pre-start failure resumes from the first pending step
Partial failure skips VERIFIED and verifies APPLIED
Completed-but-timed-out Run reconciles without repeating Agent work
Lost push or MR response is queried before retry
Delivery never invokes merge API

tasks.title: 前端可观测与断线独立验收
acceptance_criteria: Normal progress event is visible within three seconds
Duplicate, reordered and missing events cannot roll back state
Disconnected WebSocket falls back to polling
Run, Execution, Requirement and MR states remain distinct
Evidence authorization and redaction are enforced

tasks.title: 创建或更新唯一 MR
acceptance_criteria: All work is in one requirement feature branch
MR source SHA equals the accepted SHA
MR documents migration, validation and rollback
CODEOWNERS review is requested
MR is not automatically merged

security: Evidence fields require backend authorization and redaction
Manual observations are append-only and audited
No direct CRUD updates for ownership, step or effect states
performance: Normal WebSocket progress is visible within three seconds
Active polling is five seconds and inactive polling is thirty seconds
Overview query does not expand full journals or logs
reliability: Claim and fencing protect all writes
WebSocket loss converges through authoritative polling

testing_strategy.developer_tests: Each implementation task adds focused unit and integration tests within its scope.
testing_strategy.acceptance_tests: ACC-001, ACC-002 and ACC-003 are explicit independent test-agent tasks.
testing_strategy.concurrency_tests: Use real PostgreSQL semantics for unique-key and CAS races.
testing_strategy.e2e_tests: Exercise RequirementWorkspace, WebSocket reorder/disconnect, observations and MR status separation.

startup_gates: Enable required eadp-backend and suid skills before coding
Classify and preserve the existing dirty worktree changes
Record the one Requirement feature branch and worktree before claiming EXE-001
fixed_decisions: One worktree and feature branch per Requirement
Create or update one MR without automatic merge
